commands.review_summary:
The branch adds config-aware explicit command-turn detection, uses it in source-reply delivery and plugin-bound dispatch fallback decisions, and adds focused regression coverage for missing `CommandSource` control commands.

PR surface: Source +23, Tests +194. Total +217 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main treats missing `CommandSource` as a normal non-explicit turn even when `CommandAuthorized` is true, so `/reset` can remain suppressed under message-tool visible replies. The linked Mattermost issue and merged fix provide real-world precedent for the same path.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is indicated; the remaining action is maintainer review of the message-delivery risk plus current-head CI before merge.
